nasb.text: “Artaxerxes, king of kings, to Ezra the priest, the scribe of the law of the God of heaven, perfect peace. And now

esv.text: “Artaxerxes, king of kings, to Ezra the priest, the scribe of the Law of the God of heaven. Peace.  And now

cnv.text: “諸王之王亞達薛西賜諭旨給以斯拉祭司，精通天上　神律法的經學家，願你平安。

ccb.text: “王中之王亚达薛西降旨给精通天上上帝律法的教师以斯拉祭司，愿你平安！
